result.finding: Internal/Public — the application stores only photo image data (BLOB) and technical metadata (filename, size, MIME type, dimensions, timestamp). No PII, PHI, PCI, or confidential business data handled.
evidence: Photo entity fields: id (UUID), originalFileName, photoData (BLOB), storedFileName, filePath, fileSize, mimeType, uploadedAt, width, height
No user/identity fields (no email, name, address, phone, SSN)
No formal data classification documentation found in README or docs
values: Data types: image BLOB, technical metadata (filename, size, MIME type, dimensions, timestamp)
No PII, no PHI, no PCI data
Photo filenames could indirectly reveal information about content
